title: chamaecrista portoricensis var. callosa
intro: Chamaecrista portoricensis var. callosa, also known as the Puerto Rican sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Chamaecrista portoricensis var. callosa include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
